g.title: acq.fund_debit:fund->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_debit:xfer_destination->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (xfer_destination) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_debit:origin_currency_type->acq.currency_type:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (origin_currency_type) REFERENCES acq.currency_type(code) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_debit:invoice_entry->acq.invoice_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (invoice_entry) REFERENCES acq.invoice_entry(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: acq.debit_attribution:fund_debit->acq.fund_debit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund_debit) REFERENCES acq.fund_debit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:fund_debit->acq.fund_debit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund_debit) REFERENCES acq.fund_debit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.po_item:fund_debit->acq.fund_debit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund_debit) REFERENCES acq.fund_debit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
